I got duped into replying to a Renegade BBS post that used $variables to repeat back private info.
 
Was seeing ~r from line noise common with you back then? It was here. I never see it references online though. We had a guy who made his signoff sig ~r because of it. He was always at 1200.

I don't know, honestly, what law is. You just generally do that. The US captured a German sub in WWII and rescued all but one of them. Nobody's sure how the one guy died. And that was a legit attack sub, not some unarmed practice vessle.

We had better manner against actual Nazis.

Don’t get me wrong, there will always be niches that can be served, but generally I think we have hit peak technology (with silicon tech, I guess). Everybody hoping for the next iPhone doesn’t get how final that form will be. Gaming tech pretty similar, it’s peaked.
Is EA still using the Origin brand these days? Tbh, more likely ‘Xbox Series O (with Copilot)’ or something equally worse.

record.text:
I asked MIT and they said, "As the lab will be interdisciplinary, the quantum computing work will extend to life science applications!"

That answer still leaves me confused, though.
Is that your way of saying you watched depositions instead?
Yes, I agree it seems peculiar.
楽して早く良いものが生まれ捨てられる世界より、不便で遅くてもいいから安全で倫理が守られてる世界に住みてえよ。

よく聞く話、自動・最適・高速に優れていても、高速と安全性は基本的に反比例するものだし、人間の価値観や道徳観は完全にモデル化できない以上、曖昧な状況か下での判断はできない(もしくは倫理的に誤った方向に舵を切った場合に高速で自律的に動くので被害が大きくなる)。
なによりも責任の所在がないから最終的に「AIの判断だった」という逃げ道を作ることになる。
これみよがしに言いたいわけではないけど、最適化自動化を求める最たるものは生活でも大企業でもなく軍である、というのは現実に根差していれば薄々わかっていたことなのではと思う。

The new orange ghost in Ms. Pac-Man, Sue, was named after both (of GCC) Doug Macrae's sister and (of Midway) Stan Jarocki's daughter, Susan.

Susan Jarocki would eventually make her own mark on the video game industry as part of SNK's leadership in the 1990s.

🎶 OP 》„ATTITUDE“ von aespa
🎵 ED 》„KILL SHOT“ von RIIZE

Auf der offiziellen Website der Anime-Umsetzung stellten die Verantwortlichen die Interpreten der Theme-Songs offiziell vor. Der Opening-Song »ATTITUDE« wird von aespa gesungen, während der Ending-Song »KILL SHOT« von RIIZE stammt. Der Anime startet am 11. April im japanischen TV.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Der legendäre Auftragskiller Juuzou Oogami kennt kein Scheitern. Doch nach einem Einsatz wird er von einer mysteriösen Wespe gestochen und wacht als 13 jähriger Junge wieder auf. Noch bevor er begreift, was passiert ist, bekommt er den nächsten Auftrag: Er soll in dieser Gestalt eine Mittelschule infiltrieren. Zwischen chaotischem Schulalltag, auffälligen Mitschülern und neuen Gefahren stellt sich nur eine Frage: Schafft Juuzou es, wieder zu seinem alten Körper zurückzukehren, oder endet sein zweites Leben, bevor es richtig beginnt?

record.text: How do you make Senior engineers if AI will replace Junior engineers?

Just because you are good engineers now and you know how to do your stuff, doesn't mean you're always going to be on top of your game.

I don't think AI is ready to enter production environments. This is more so criticizing the use of AI for PR checks at all, than code creation/completion.

I understand all that. It's as if you don't think I understand that already.

I just think trusting a non-deterministic solution for a deterministic problem breeds failure points that aren't obvious now, but can become painfully obvious later.
I don't know if AI is capable of something like this, even
I feel like "bad" doesn't even do it justice

I've never read/listened to THE MARTIAN, but I love the movie, so I'm probably gonna check that out once I finish PHM. 

THE MARTIAN really is one of my favorite movies of the past few years. Just a rollicking good time. My favorite Ridley Scott movie since ... GLADIATOR?
If they stopped pushing AI it would do way more for the environment.

external.description: After months of pressuring India to stop buying Russian oil, the United States has granted New Delhi a temporary waiver allowing it to purchase fuel from Moscow, as the war in the Middle East limits global oil supplies. "To enable oil to keep flowing into the global market, the Treasury Department is issuing a temporary 30-day waiver to allow Indian refiners to purchase Russian oil," U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said in a social media post on March 5. "This deliberately short-term measure will not provide significant financial benefit to the Russian government as it only authorizes transactions involving oil already stranded at sea," he added. "India is an essential partner of the United States," Bessent wrote, noting that Washington expects New Delhi to increase purchases of U.S. oil. "This stop-gap measure will alleviate pressure caused by Iran's attempt to take global energy hostage." Indian refiners have begun buying millions of barrels of prompt Russian crude cargoes as the country navigates tightening oil supplies triggered by the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran, according to six sources familiar with the matter who spoke to Reuters. Bessent's announcement follows months of pressure from Washington urging New Delhi to reduce purchases of Russian oil...

Text Shot: Several thousand members of the campus community are already piloting the first tool, U of A Gen AI, which allows users to choose from five commercially available large language models: Claude, OpenAI, Gemma, Meta Llama and Amazon Nova.

In addition to U of A Gen AI, the platform will eventually include additional services to support teaching and learning, research and operations across campus. These include: 

A public-facing campus chatbot that uses verified university information to answer questions about programs, services and resources
An Arizona AI assistant that will allow colleges, departments and offices to create custom chatbots that retrieve information only from approved institutional data sources
AI sandboxes that provide controlled, secure environments where researchers, instructors and students can test and experiment with AI systems without exposing sensitive or restricted data
